title: Propose Dynasty Wallet Diversification Plan and Liquidity Rotation Plan

reasoning.problem: I intend to submit two bills to address the immediate threats identified by SCOTOMA and promote long-term sustainability. The first bill, 'Dynasty Wallet Diversification Plan,' will outline a strategy for diversifying assets away from the Dynasty wallet to mitigate overfitting risk. This plan will detail the target allocation across various asset classes and establish a timeline for achieving the desired diversification. The second bill, 'Liquidity Rotation Plan,' will address the issue of excessive cash reserves. This plan will propose strategies for deploying the excess cash into yield-generating assets or alternative investment opportunities, while maintaining a sufficient liquidity buffer to ensure operational resilience. Both plans will adhere to the 'Survival Imperative' and the principles of the Trading Wisdom framework.
